summary: This document outlines the Standard Operating Procedure for usability engineering within the company's Quality Management System. It details the end-to-end process for medical device design, including user research, prototyping, testing, and risk management to comply with standards like IEC 62366-1. The text covers planning, development, verification, and post-market monitoring phases.
